label: Difficulty condition config
description: Flags that gate behavior on active difficulty settings. All fields default to false.

bigThreatsDisabled.label: Big threats disabled
bigThreatsDisabled.description: Condition is met when the 'disable big threats' difficulty option is active.

trapsDisabled.label: Traps disabled
trapsDisabled.description: Condition is met when the 'disable traps' difficulty option is active.

turretsDisabled.label: Turrets disabled
turretsDisabled.description: Condition is met when the 'disable turrets' difficulty option is active.

mortarsDisabled.label: Mortars disabled
mortarsDisabled.description: Condition is met when the 'disable mortars' difficulty option is active.

extremeWeatherIncidentsDisabled.label: Extreme weather incidents disabled
extremeWeatherIncidentsDisabled.description: Condition is met when the 'disable extreme weather incidents' difficulty option is active.
